titleStmt.title: SII 31.235: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 235. (A.R. No. B 290 of 1936.) MADDIKEṞA, PATTIKONDA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near the village Chāvaḍi.
It is dated Śaka in 1661, Siddhārti, Māgha, śu. 2, corresponding to 1740 A.D., January 19, Saturday.

It records an assurance (Bharavasa) to the mercantile communities viz., merchants belonging to Maddimeṟa and Chappanadēśālavāru by Śrī Rājarāmappanāyaka Rājarāmappa nāyaka is described as the son of Bujjappanāyaka and the grandson of Dēvarakoṇḍa Rāmappa nāyaka. The donor Rāmappanāyaka belonged to the lunar race and Mārkanḍēya gōtra and bears the title Dēśingarāya-rājya-sthāpanāchārya (the establisher of the kingdom of Dēśingarāya).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvā(svā)mi śrīmallēśvara
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1661 Agunēṁṭi siddhā¨rtti nāma saṁvatsa
ra māṣu śu 2 lu sōmavaṁśōdbhavulaina dēśiṁgarāya rājyastāpanā
cāryulayna mā¨rkaṁḍēya gōtra pavitlru yina śrīman mahārājaśrī
dēvanikoṁḍa rāmapanāyanivāri pautṛlayina bujjapanāyani
putṛlayni śrīrājarāmappanāyanivāru saṁtapēṭṭa maddhi
kerastaḷaṁ parastaḷaṁ ceppannāru dēśāyalaki vrāyiṁcci yicci
na śilāśāsanaṁ . samastamaina prajalu bharavasa kāvalesani mana
vi cēstirigāska drōhalu
rākuṁḍānu māyiṣṭadaivaṁ śrīdonamallikājju¨rnadēvarasākṣi
gānu tappitaṁ rākuṁḍāsu kavulū yiccina śilā
śāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 31.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
